summary: No-ship: one remaining identity-collapse path still lets a hook for a new Claude session overwrite an existing sid-owned row in the same cwd.

findings.title: Hook fallback by cwd can overwrite a different claudeSessionId
findings.recommendation: When a hook carries opts.claudeSessionId, do not fall back to a cwd/worktree match if that matched row already has a different claudeSessionId. Either only stamp sid-less rows, or auto-create/update a UUID-keyed row for the new sid. Add a regression where sidA already exists in the cwd, then applyHookEvent arrives with sidB for the same cwd; both sidA and sidB should remain distinct and no map-key/field mismatch should occur.
